picks.name: Applied Materials, Inc.
picks.thesis: AMAT is down 28% from its 52-week high while earnings grew 2%/yr — a sentiment-driven pullback, not fundamental deterioration. Quality looks intact (healthy margins, durable revenue, long-term uptrend), and it's now at or below fair value ($529.66 vs $612.74, low confidence). Valued with DCF and Comps.
